creator: colin-ports@heliocat.net
text:
YYYYMMDD:
  AFFECTS: users of lang/execline
  AUTHOR: Colin Booth <colin-ports@heliocat.net>

  execline has undergone a major version bump and compatibility is not 
  guaranteed for software with a runtime dependency on 
  libexecline.so.2.3.0.4 or earlier.. This will not affect sysutils/s6 
  as all s6 programs are statically linked against libexecline.a.
  Additionally, the deprecated import command has been removed. Scripts 
  relying on that command should have been adjusted to use importas.
